title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 470.120 - Judgment for state, when
text:
470.120.  Judgment for state, when. — If, after the issues are tried, it appear from the facts that the state hath good title to the lands and tenements described in the information, or any part thereof, judgment shall be rendered that the state be seized thereof and recover costs against the defendant.
(RSMo 1939 § 631) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 631; 1919 § 5320; 1909 § 6267
